items.title: FedEx sues Trump administration for full tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruling on IEEPA
items.description: FedEx sues U.S. government for tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruled Trump's emergency trade duties on imports were unlawful.

items.title: Trump Organization signs deal for billion-dollar skyscraper on Australia's Gold Coast
items.description: The Trump Organization announced a $1 billion project in Australia last week, building a 91-floor luxury resort and apartments on the Gold Coast.
